name: onreza-claude-plugins
description: ONREZA's Claude Code plugin marketplace — internal toolkits for code review, development workflows and project-specific automation

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, simplification, UX, performance, and security. Includes a findings-triager that filters false positives and separates pre-existing from PR-introduced issues. Fork of Anthropic's pr-review-toolkit.
